openshopStep1.questionHeader: What type of business do you operate?
openshopStep1.expectNote: Our team typically reviews applications within 2-3 business days. Make sure your documents are clear and accurate to speed up approval.
openshopStep1.businessTypeIndividualDesc: Use your ID card or passport. You are selling as a private individual and not a registered business.
openshopStep1.businessTypeSoleProprietorDesc: Requires a business registration certificate. You are the sole owner of a legally registered business.
openshopStep1.businessTypeCorporateDesc: A legal entity in the form of a company, clearly separated from its owners.
openshopStep1.businessTypePartnershipDesc: A business operated jointly by two or more individuals.

openshopStep3.identityInfo: This information will be used and stored for identity verification, screening, and fraud prevention purposes.
openshopStep3.uploadHintPassport: Upload images of both biometric pages of your passport...
openshopStep3.uploadHintSize: Files must be smaller than 10 MB in JPG, PNG, JPEG, or PDF format.
openshopStep3.uploadHintClarity: Ensure the image clearly shows all information on your ID...
openshopStep3.personalInfoNote: Ensure that all information entered below matches exactly what appears on your uploaded ID.

openshopStep4.reviewIntro: Please review all your information carefully before confirming submission.
openshopStep4.termsAccept: I confirm that the above information is true in all respects, and I have read and accepted the
openshopStep4.reviewWithin23Days: We will review your information within 2-3 business days. If we need more information or have questions, we will contact you via your registered email or phone number.

followersPage.title: Followers
followersPage.appearHere: Once people follow @{{username}}, they'll appear here

productsAdd2.generalHint: Basic info shown on the product page and search results.
productsAdd2.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the product. Include materials, fit, sizing, and unique selling points.
productsAdd2.mediaHint: Upload up to 8 photos. The first image is used as the cover.
productsAdd2.continueSelling: Continue selling when out of stock
productsAdd2.wholesaleHint: Set MOQ and tier pricing for B2B buyers.
productsAdd2.tierHint: Set bulk-buy thresholds. The tier price (or % discount off the base price) is shown to buyers as a strike-through deal on the product page.
productsAdd2.specsHint: Key/value pairs (e.g. Material → 100% cotton). Shown on the Specifications tab of your product page.
productsAdd2.noVariantsNeeded: This category does not require variants. You can still add custom options if needed.
productsAdd2.tapToAdd: Tap suggestions or type your own.
productsAdd2.detailsHint: These descriptors appear on the product page so buyers know exactly what they're getting.
productsAdd2.creatorAffiliateHint: Let approved creators promote this product and earn commission on each verified sale.
productsAdd2.allowCreators: Allow creators to promote this product
productsAdd2.allowCreatorsDesc: Creators add this product to their feed and you only pay commission on verified sales.
productsAdd2.freeShippingDesc: A green "Free shipping" badge will appear on the product page.
productsAdd2.leadTimeHint: How long after payment until you ship. Shown as 'Lead Time' on the product page.
productsAdd2.returnsHint: Return window shown on the product page. Disable if you don't accept returns.
productsAdd2.acceptReturnsDesc: Buyers can request a return within the window below.
productsAdd2.conditionsPlaceholder: e.g. Item must be unopened and in original packaging.
productsAdd2.seoHint: How this product appears in Google and social shares.
productsAdd2.metaPlaceholder: Short summary that appears on search results.
productsAdd2.categoryResets: Switching the category resets the variant template below.
productsAdd2.needHelpDesc: Read our seller guide on writing titles, pricing for wholesale, and choosing the right variants.
productsAdd2.addOneImage: Add at least one product image.

productsEdit2.mediaUpTo8: Up to 8 photos. The first is the cover.

transfer.noPaymentMethods: No payment methods configured yet. Please contact support.
transfer.uploadDesc: Upload the bank/wallet transfer slip and the admin will verify within a few hours.
transfer.referencePlaceholder: e.g. last 4 digits of slip ref
transfer.orderMarkedPaid: Your order will be marked paid once the admin verifies the slip.
transfer.scanInstruction: Scan with any bank app · amount {{amount}} baked in
transfer.qrFixedWarn: ⚠ This QR is fixed — make sure you transfer the exact total above.
transfer.attachSlipFirst: Please attach the transfer slip image first
transfer.missingSeller: This product link is missing the seller. Open the product again and click Buy.
transfer.noItemsOrder: No items to order. Add something to your cart first.
transfer.qrFixedWarning: ⚠ This QR is fixed — make sure you transfer the exact total above.

receipt.missingOrderId: Missing order id — open this page from a checkout completion.
receipt.slipRejectedDesc: Our team couldn't verify the transfer. Please re-upload a clear slip from the checkout page.
receipt.paymentConfirmedDesc: Thank you for your purchase. Your order is now being processed.
receipt.slipAwaitDesc: Our team will review your transfer slip within a few hours. You'll get a notification once the order is confirmed.
receipt.completePaymentDesc: Complete the payment from the checkout page to confirm your order.

receipt.missingOrderIdShort: Missing order id — open this page from a checkout completion.

payment.infoProtected: Your information is protected with encryption.

securityPanel2.pinCannotChange: Once set, this PIN cannot be modified. Please remember it clearly.

openshopStep2More.entityPlaceholder: Enter exactly as shown on license
openshopStep2More.entityNote: * This must match your official registration documents.
openshopStep2More.bankInfoDesc: Enter your shop's bank account information to receive payments. Please make sure the account name and account number are correct. This information will be used for withdrawals and settlements.
openshopStep2More.mainProductsDesc: Choose the category that best describes the products you sell. This will not affect your future business and will be used for registration purposes only.
openshopStep2More.secureDesc: To secure your account, we need your email and phone number for verification. This information will be used for screening. We recommend using a business email for better authentication.
openshopStep2More.currentEmailNote: This is the email currently linked to your account.
openshopStep2More.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.

openshopStep3More.addressOptionsQ: Which option applies to the address you entered?
openshopStep3More.businessOnlyAddress: This is a business address only. I understand that my address will be displayed on the product details page.
openshopStep3More.alsoResidence: This is also my residence. I certify that I do not have a business-only address.

addressForm2.warehouseInfo: Warehouse address will be used for product pickup by shipping companies. You can add multiple addresses.
addressForm2.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this address?

shopDetailPanel2.approvedDesc: Your shop is verified and live.

shopDetailPanel2.lockedInfo: To update any of these details, please contact support — KYC information is locked once submitted to keep audit trails consistent.

addBank.nameMatchWarning: Bank account name must match registered name to prevent transfer errors.
addBank.consentBefore: By confirming, you agree to the

fashion.label: Fashion & Accessories
fashion.description: Clothing, shoes, bags, accessories. Buyers pick a size and color before ordering.

electronics.label: Electronics & Gadgets
electronics.description: Tech products. Variants typically capture color, storage, and connectivity.

beauty.label: Beauty & Personal Care
beauty.description: Skincare, makeup, fragrance. Variants describe shade and net weight.

food.label: Food & Beverages
food.description: Edible goods. Capture pack size and expiry — required for compliance.

home.label: Home & Living
home.description: Furniture, décor, kitchenware. Capture material and dimensions.

mother_baby.label: Mother & Baby
mother_baby.description: Baby products. Variant on age range, capture safety info.

toys.label: Toys & Hobbies
toys.description: Toys, models, hobbies. Variant on color, capture age range.

sports.label: Sports & Outdoors
sports.description: Sports gear. Variant on size and color, capture sport.

automotive.label: Automotive
automotive.description: Car & moto parts. Capture compatibility info.

health.label: Health & Wellness
health.description: Vitamins, supplements, medical aids. Variant on pack count.

pet.label: Pet Supplies
pet.description: Pet food, accessories. Variant on size, capture pet type.

office.label: Office & Stationery
office.description: Stationery, office supplies. Variant on color and pack quantity.

tools.label: Tools & Home Improvement
tools.description: Hand tools, power tools, hardware. Capture power source.

jewelry.label: Jewelry & Watches
jewelry.description: Jewelry & watches. Variant on metal, gemstone, ring size.

digital.label: Digital Products
digital.description: Software, e-books, licenses. No physical variants needed.

others.label: Others
others.description: Catch-all for anything not covered above.

individual.desc: Use your ID card or passport. You are selling as a private individual and not a registered business.

partnership.title: Partnership
partnership.desc: A business operated jointly by two or more individuals.
